$description: Gray 10 theme - Light theme with subtle contrast, ideal for data-dense interfaces and professional applications

end.$description: End color for AI aura gradient effect. Creates a fade-to-transparent effect at the edge of AI-enhanced elements.

background.$description: Background color for AI aura on hover. Use when user hovers over AI-enhanced interactive elements.

end.$description: End color for AI aura gradient on hover. Creates hover state fade effect for AI elements.

start.$description: Start color for AI aura gradient on hover. Provides the vibrant blue beginning of the hover gradient.
Start color for AI aura gradient effect. Provides the vibrant blue beginning of the gradient for AI-enhanced elements.

sm.$description: Start color for small AI aura gradient. Use for compact AI indicators or smaller UI elements.

end.$description: End color for AI border gradient. Creates the lighter edge of gradient borders on AI elements.

start.$description: Start color for AI border gradient. Creates the darker edge of gradient borders on AI elements.

strong.$description: Strong border color for AI elements. Use for high-emphasis AI borders that need clear definition.

shadow.$description: Drop shadow color for AI elements. Provides depth and elevation for AI-enhanced components.
Inner shadow color for AI elements. Creates inset depth effect for AI-enhanced surfaces.

overlay.$description: Overlay color for AI modal backgrounds. Use to dim content behind AI dialogs or popovers.

background.$description: Background color for AI popovers and tooltips. Provides the base surface for AI-generated content displays.

bottom.$description: Bottom caret color for AI popovers. Creates the gradient pointer at the bottom of AI tooltips.

background.$description: Background color for bottom caret of AI popovers. Provides the base color for the popover pointer.

actions.$description: Background color for action area in AI popover bottom caret. Use for interactive sections within AI tooltips.

center.$description: Center color for AI popover caret gradient. Creates the vibrant middle of the gradient pointer.

01.$description: Primary outer shadow for AI popovers. Provides the first layer of depth for elevated AI elements.

02.$description: Secondary outer shadow for AI popovers. Adds additional depth layer for AI element elevation.

background.$description: Background color for AI skeleton loaders. Use while AI-generated content is loading.
Element background color for AI skeleton loaders. Provides the animated shimmer effect for loading AI content.
Default page background color. Use as the base surface for the entire application or page.

active.$description: Background color for active/pressed state. Use when user clicks or presses interactive elements.

brand.$description: Brand color for backgrounds. Use for branded sections, headers, or promotional areas.

hover.$description: Background color for hover state. Use when user hovers over interactive elements to provide visual feedback.

inverse.$description: Inverse background color for dark UI elements. Use for tooltips, inverse buttons, or dark-themed sections.

hover.$description: Hover state for inverse backgrounds. Use when user hovers over dark UI elements.

selected.$description: Background color for selected state. Use to highlight currently selected items or active states.

hover.$description: Hover state for selected backgrounds. Use when user hovers over already-selected items.

disabled.$description: Border color for disabled elements. Use when borders need to indicate unavailable or inactive state.

interactive.$description: Border color for interactive elements. Use for focused inputs, active selections, or clickable borders.

inverse.$description: Border color for inverse/dark UI elements. Use for borders on dark backgrounds or inverse components.

01.$description: Strong border color for layer 01. Use for high-contrast borders that need clear definition on first layer.

02.$description: Strong border color for layer 02. Use for high-contrast borders on second layer surfaces.

03.$description: Strong border color for layer 03. Use for high-contrast borders on third layer surfaces.

00.$description: Subtle border color for base layer. Use for low-contrast borders on page background.

01.$description: Subtle border color for layer 01. Use for low-contrast borders on first layer surfaces.

02.$description: Subtle border color for layer 02. Use for low-contrast borders on second layer surfaces.

03.$description: Subtle border color for layer 03. Use for low-contrast borders on third layer surfaces.

01.$description: Subtle border for selected items on layer 01. Use for low-contrast borders on selected elements.

02.$description: Subtle border for selected items on layer 02. Use for low-contrast borders on selected elements.

03.$description: Subtle border for selected items on layer 03. Use for low-contrast borders on selected elements.

01.$description: Border color for tiles on layer 01. Use for card or tile borders on first layer.

02.$description: Border color for tiles on layer 02. Use for card or tile borders on second layer.

03.$description: Border color for tiles on layer 03. Use for card or tile borders on third layer.

agent.$description: Avatar background color for human agents in chat. Use to distinguish agent messages from bot or user.

bot.$description: Avatar background color for AI bots in chat. Use to identify automated or AI-generated responses.

user.$description: Avatar background color for users in chat. Use to identify messages from the current user.

agent.$description: Background color for agent message bubbles. Use for messages from human agents in chat interfaces.

text.$description: Text color for agent message bubbles. Ensures readable contrast in agent messages.

border.$description: Border color for chat message bubbles. Provides visual definition for all message types.

user.$description: Background color for user message bubbles. Use for messages from the current user in chat interfaces.

text.$description: Text color for user message bubbles. Ensures readable contrast in user messages.

button.$description: Icon color for chat action buttons. Use for interactive elements within chat interface.

active.$description: Background color for chat buttons in active/pressed state. Use when user clicks chat actions.

hover.$description: Background color for chat buttons on hover. Use to provide feedback when hovering over chat actions.

selected.$description: Background color for selected chat buttons. Use to highlight currently active chat action.

hover.$description: Text color for chat buttons on hover. Provides visual feedback for interactive chat elements.

selected.$description: Text color for selected chat buttons. Indicates the currently active chat action.

background.$description: Background color for chat header. Use for the top section of chat interfaces.

text.$description: Text color for chat header. Ensures readable titles and labels in chat header.

background.$description: Background color for chat input prompt area. Use for the message composition field.

end.$description: End color for chat prompt border gradient. Creates fade effect at edge of input area.

start.$description: Start color for chat prompt border gradient. Defines the beginning of input border gradient.

text.$description: Text color for chat input prompt. Ensures readable text in message composition area.

background.$description: Background color for chat container shell. Use as the base surface for entire chat interface.

01.$description: Background color for form fields on layer 01. Use for input fields, text areas, and selects on first layer.

02.$description: Background color for form fields on layer 02. Use for input fields on second layer surfaces.

03.$description: Background color for form fields on layer 03. Use for input fields on third layer surfaces.

01.$description: Hover background for fields on layer 01. Use when user hovers over input fields on first layer.

02.$description: Hover background for fields on layer 02. Use when user hovers over input fields on second layer.

03.$description: Hover background for fields on layer 03. Use when user hovers over input fields on third layer.

focus.$description: Focus indicator color. Use for focus rings and outlines on interactive elements for keyboard navigation.

inset.$description: Inset focus indicator color. Use for inner focus rings on elements with colored backgrounds.

inverse.$description: Focus indicator for inverse/dark elements. Use for focus rings on dark backgrounds.

highlight.$description: Highlight color for selected text or emphasized content. Use for text selection or search result highlighting.

disabled.$description: Icon color for disabled state. Use when icons need to indicate unavailable or inactive functionality.

interactive.$description: Icon color for interactive elements. Use for clickable icons, buttons, and actionable items.

inverse.$description: Icon color for inverse/dark backgrounds. Use for icons on dark surfaces or inverse components.

color.$description: Icon color for colored backgrounds. Use for icons on brand colors, buttons, or colored surfaces.

disabled.$description: Disabled icon color on colored backgrounds. Use when icons on colored surfaces are inactive.

primary.$description: Primary icon color. Use for main icons with highest visual priority and emphasis.

secondary.$description: Secondary icon color. Use for supporting icons with less emphasis than primary.

interactive.$description: Interactive element color. Use for clickable elements, links, and actionable items.

02.$description: 02. Token for 02 in the design system.

disabled.$description: Disabled. Token for disabled in the design system.

inverse.$description: Inverse. Token for inverse in the design system.
Link color for dark backgrounds. Use for links on inverse or dark surfaces.

active.$description: Active state for inverse links. Use when user clicks links on dark backgrounds.

hover.$description: Hover state for inverse links. Use when hovering over links on dark backgrounds.

visited.$description: Visited link color for dark backgrounds. Use for previously clicked links on inverse surfaces.

primary.$description: Primary link color. Use for standard hyperlinks and navigation links.

hover.$description: Hover color for primary links. Use when user hovers over standard links.

secondary.$description: Secondary link color. Use for less prominent links or alternative link styles.

visited.$description: Color for visited links. Use to indicate previously clicked links.

overlay.$description: Overlay color for modal backgrounds. Use to dim content behind dialogs and modals.

shadow.$description: Shadow color for elevation. Provides depth and layering for elevated components.

background.$description: Background color for skeleton loaders. Use as base for loading placeholders.

element.$description: Element color for skeleton loaders. Provides the animated shimmer effect for loading states.

major.$description: Major caution color. Use for high-severity warnings or significant issues.

minor.$description: Minor caution color. Use for low-severity warnings or minor issues.

undefined.$description: Undefined caution color. Use for unknown or indeterminate caution states.

error.$description: Error color for critical states. Use for error messages, failed validations, and critical alerts.

inverse.$description: Error color for dark backgrounds. Use for error indicators on inverse surfaces.

info.$description: Info color for informational states. Use for helpful tips, neutral information, and guidance.

inverse.$description: Info color for dark backgrounds. Use for info indicators on inverse surfaces.

success.$description: Success color for positive states. Use for success messages, completed actions, and confirmations.

inverse.$description: Success color for dark backgrounds. Use for success indicators on inverse surfaces.

warning.$description: Warning color for caution states. Use for warnings, potential issues, and items needing attention.

inverse.$description: Warning color for dark backgrounds. Use for warning indicators on inverse surfaces.
